name: goliath/videos-copy
title: Videos – Supporting Copy
description: Two-column supporting copy section on the Videos page.

leftP1.default: Pallet racking damage is a constant issue in busy warehouses, but the real problem is how it is managed over time. Goliath™ is designed to break the cycle of repeated damage, costly replacements, and downtime.

leftP2.default: Our video series shows how Goliath™ repairs and reinforces uprights differently from traditional methods, delivering a permanent solution that improves safety, reduces downtime, and lowers long-term maintenance costs.

rightHeading.default: Learn How Goliath™ Breaks the Repair Cycle

rightP1.default: Traditional pallet racking repair replaces damaged uprights after impact, restoring the rack but not preventing future damage.

rightP2.default: The Goliath™ video series shows how our high-strength steel repair system reinforces the impact zone, turning repeated repairs into a permanent structural upgrade.
